name: Satoshi Mochida
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5' 6") A student from Kisaragi Academy's high school class 2-9. Satoshi is kindhearted by nature, often willing to go the extra mile for those he cares for. Ironically, Satoshi is also a bit of a coward, and was highly reluctant to take part in the ritual that placed him and his peers at Heavenly Host Elementary School. A bit of a blockhead, Satoshi is blissfully unaware of the crushes multiple girls in his group of peers have for him, which never sees further development as

name: Seong-Ji Yook
description: He was a member of the 1st Generation and the King of Cheonliang. He was called the Monster of Cheonliang Mountain, possibly due to him having 6 fingers on each hand and 6 toes on each foot. He was the mentor of Vin Jin. He was a disciple of Jin Mujin, Vin Jin's father.

name: Shidou Kirisaki
description: __Height:__ 180 cm __Status:__ Prisoner No.005 An adult male prisoner, tall with a gentle expression. Comparatively older among those in Milgram, he always remains calm and composed, unperturbed by most things. He seems quite insistent on comforting the younger inmates as one might with children, the prison guard included; it is as if he perceives them as such. Despite not understanding the situation in Milgram, he is satisfied with his imprisonment and wishes the death penalty upon himself. __T

name: Shihai Kuroiro
description: Shihai is a sly, deceitful schemer, who prefers to catch people off guard. He appears to enjoy dark concepts and has a penchant for dramatic speech

name: Shizuko Kaga
description: **Height:** 158 cm One of Misaki and Sakura’s friends, a sensible and intelligent girl who often spends lunchtime with them. Shizuko is a member of the flower arranging club and is good at math, but isn’t very good at physical activities. She has an older brother in university and a younger sister in junior high school; according to Sakura, the three of them look very alike. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Sigma
description: Sigma is the "true" Master of Watcher in the False Holy Grail War of Fate/strange Fake. ~!Sigma is the product of rape between [Maiya Hisau](https://anilist.co/character/16020/) and an unknown soldier. He wasn't given a name and was taken away from Maiya when he was a baby.!~

name: Stoltz
description: Stark's older brother, referred to as the strongest warrior in the village.

name: Sylvia Silkcut
nativeName: シルヴィア・ シルクカット
description: Sylvia Silkcut is a beautiful young girl with purple eyes and short bob-cut blonde hair with a hairpin in it. She usually wears her school uniform. She has a petite body and is considered very cute by everyone. Other female members of Amaterasu often tempt her.

name: Takeshi Wakatsuki
description: Wakatsuki Takeshi, also known as The Wild Tiger, is the affiliated fighter of Furumi Pharmaceuticals; he represented the company during the Kengan Annihilation Tournament. Takeshi is the longest-serving active affiliated Kengan fighter and has the highest win record of all affiliated fighters. Two years later he entered the Kengan Association VS Purgatory Tournament as a representative of the Kengan Association. Takeshi is quiet, yet easy to befriend. name: Tatsuyuki Misumi
description: 26 years old. Six dan. He is often called "Sumisu" (for "Smith"). He is 180 centimeters tall. A bit aloof, he gets along well with Matsumoto.

name: Tiziano
description: Tiziano is a man of slim build and average height, having dark skin and long, straight, light hair. Tiziano wears loose light-colored overalls, as well as a dark headband and dark gloves, and typical sandals. (Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia)

name: Whisper
description: Whisper is one of the deuteragonists of the Yo-kai Watch franchise. He is also one of the mascots of the franchise, alongside others like Jibanyan, Komason, and Komajiro. He is Amano Keita (aka Nathan Adam's) self-proclaimed Yo-kai butler. Despite his oblivious and sarcastic personality in some versions of himself, mainly the English dub of the anime, he never fails to help the protagonist in his adventures by providing valuable knowledge about the Yo-kai Watch and the Yo-kai themselves. name: Wolbach
description: Wolbach is a goddess that presides over violence and sloth. She serves as one of the eight generals of the Demon King and has many worshippers within the Demon King's army. ~!She was a major antagonist, being one of the most predominately featured of the eight generals of the Demon King's army, and was the arch-nemesis of the adventurer Megumin. name: Yasopp
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") __Blood Type:__ S __Affiliations:__ Red Hair Pirates __Position:__ Sniper Acting as the sniper of the Red Hair Pirate Crew, Yasopp is a gifted sharp-shooter said to be capable of shooting the legs off an ant at 100 feet without harming the rest of it. He is the father of [Usopp](https://anilist.co/character/724) and was one of [Luffy's](https://anilist.co/character/40/Luffy-Monkey) favorite members of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Yi Ming
description: Yi Ming is one of the Five Elemental Masters in the Heavenly Court.

name: Yoiyami Black
description: The oldest of the current ranger group and the one who assembled the members. He is shown to look sleepy and uses difficult language. He always seems to be busy, and has the role as a guardian.

name: Zazie
description: Zazie is a former Λ7214 experiment. He is the strongest among the humans. He gets mad when he doesn't wear the paper bag. He loves his boss, Norman.

name: Adélie
description: Adélie is a young Gentooan who Dandy meets on Planet Humbolt. Originally hunting her kind for a whopping 8 million woolong reward, Dandy takes a shine to her (and vice versa) and tries to put her in contact with [another Gentooan](https://anilist.co/character/381697/Ojiichan) (her grandfather). Despite her apparent age, Adélie is feisty, isn't afraid to speak her mind and do what it takes to get what she requires.
